SELECT arraySort([1, nan, 2, NULL, 3, nan, -4, NULL, inf, -inf]) AS sorted_array;
SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> y, ['hello', 'world'], [2, 1]) AS sorted_hello_world;
CREATE TABLE test_multiple_columns (arr1 Array(Int32), arr2 Array(String));
SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> y, arr1, arr2) FROM test_multiple_columns;
CREATE TABLE test_nested (id Int32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id FROM (SELECT arraySort(values) AS sorted_values FROM test_nested) AS t WHERE sorted_values[1] < 3;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id Int32, keys Array(Int32));
SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> y, keys, [3, 1, 2]) AS sorted_keys FROM test_join;
SELECT arraySort([1, 2, 3, NULL, 4, Inf, -Inf, NaN]) AS ordered_array;
SELECT arraySort((x, y) -> x - y, [10, 5, 15], [0, 1, 2]) AS sorted_by_diff;
